ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album to which the track belongs */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track is explicit or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_name FOREIGN KEY ("artist_name") REFERENCES artists ("artist_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "login_history" TEXT /* Login history of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "userlisteninghistory" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date the user listened to the track */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has listened to the track */,
  "listening_time" INTEGER /* Total time the user has listened to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g. popularity, acousticness) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g. audio features, metadata) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_moods" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred mood */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_mood_id FOREIGN KEY ("mood_id") REFERENCES moods ("mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the track was recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)
